Docs  ›  Tools

All MCP tools

Auto-generated from every [McpTool] attribute in the codebase. 561 tools.

561Tools
14Always available
396Context (read)
144Action (write)
7Bridges
561 of 561
NameDescriptionContextTypeAlwaysParams
accept_fix Accept the cloud agent's fix: pull branch, build, regenerate registry. Use reload_dll after to load new code. Debug action on demand 1
accept_fix Accept the cloud agent's fix: pull branch, build, regenerate registry. Use reload_dll after to load new code. Debug action on demand 1
add_revision_to_sheets_for_export Add a revision to sheets before export. Creates a Revit revision and optionally assigns it to specific sheets. Drawing exporter action on demand 5
add_spec_custom_clause Add a custom clause to the specification clause library. Project-level clauses override standard clauses. — action on demand 5
adelphos_domain_create_schedule_workbook_for_project Create a blank MEP equipment schedule workbook (.xlsx) on the Adelphos backend and save it to disk. Uses the project_ref and a schedule type from adelphos_domain_list_schedule_types_for_user. Returns the local file path. — adelphos on demand 6
adelphos_domain_get_schedule_type_fields_for_user Return the full field spec for one schedule type (sections, field labels, units, database columns). 404 means the type is unknown — call adelphos_domain_list_schedule_types_for_user for valid keys. — adelphos on demand 1
adelphos_domain_grant_local_path_for_user Register a local Windows folder with the Adelphos Domain API so server-side tools can read and write there on the user's behalf. Call once per project folder. Requires MEPBRIDGE_ADELPHOS_TOKEN (LibreChat JWT from chat.adelphos.ai). — adelphos on demand 2
adelphos_domain_list_directory_grants_for_user List every folder the user has granted to the Adelphos Domain API (local paths + Google Drive). Use before granting a new folder to see what's already registered. — adelphos on demand 0
adelphos_domain_list_schedule_types_for_user List every MEP equipment schedule type the Adelphos backend can build (extract fan, pump, ASHP, etc.). Empty list means the backend's schedule-types volume has no type folders populated yet. — adelphos on demand 0
adelphos_domain_rebuild_drawing_issue_sheet_register_for_project Rebuild the Drawing Issue Sheet (.xlsx register) for a project. Client zips the project's 2.0 Issued folder and uploads it to the Adelphos Domain API; the rebuilt workbook is written back next to the source (or to save_to_path if provided). Requires an Adelphos JWT (see adelphos_domain_sign_in_with_jwt_for_user) and a prior grant on the folder via adelphos_domain_grant_local_path_for_user. — adelphos on demand 6
adelphos_domain_sign_in_with_jwt_for_user Store an Adelphos / LibreChat JWT on this machine so MEPBridge can call chat.adelphos.ai/domain/*. The token is encrypted at rest with Windows DPAPI (CurrentUser scope). Obtain the JWT by signing in at chat.adelphos.ai — Settings → Account → 'Show access token'. — adelphos on demand 2
adelphos_domain_sign_out_for_user Erase the stored Adelphos JWT from this machine. After this call, Adelphos-backed tools will return 'not configured' until adelphos_domain_sign_in_with_jwt_for_user is called again. — adelphos on demand 0
amtech_check_summarise_last_run amtech_check_summarise_last_run — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
annotation_preferences_get_for_category Resolve the preferred annotation family for a Revit category + optional context, walking the three-tier discovery chain. — context on demand 3
annotation_preferences_list_available_annotations List annotation families available across the model and the configured user / business family folders, plus the most recently used picks. — context on demand 3
append_to_debug_action_log Append an entry to the shared debug action log (Downloads/debug_action_log.md). Use during self-debug to track investigation progress. Debug action on demand 3
apply_queued_sheet_renames_to_model Apply all queued sheet rename operations to the Revit model. Use drawing_exporter_rename_sheets first to queue renames. Drawing exporter action on demand 0

assign_scope_box_to_view_by_name Assign a named scope box to a target view. — context on demand 2
bounding_box_analysis_check_overlap_between_two_elements Do the two elements' bounding boxes overlap? Default mode = axis-aligned; set mode=oriented for SAT on rotated elements. Returns {overlaps, overlap_volume_mm3, reason}. — context on demand 4
bounding_box_analysis_combine_parallel_services_into_thread Group N parallel services by bearing + lateral distance. Returns one BB per thread plus unthreaded elements. — context on demand 3
browse_files List files and folders in a directory. Returns names, sizes, and types. Use to explore the user's project files. Restricted to allowed directories. — context on demand 3
browse_files List files and folders in a directory. Returns names, sizes, and types. Use to explore the user's project files. Restricted to allowed directories. — context on demand 3
browser_organisation_read Read browser organisation rules for views and sheets. — context on demand 0
builderswork_get_penetration_details Return full details of a single detected penetration: host, service, OD, clearance, fire-seal annulus, fire rating, sleeve type, status. — context on demand 0
builderswork_list_communal_openings List communal-opening groupings produced by BuildersworkCommunalOpeningGrouper (BS EN 1366-3 spacing rules). — context on demand 0
builderswork_list_detected_penetrations List penetrations detected by DetectBuildersworkPenetrations for the current model + scope. — context on demand 0
builderswork_list_mep_elements_in_scope List MEP elements (pipes, ducts, cable trays, conduits) currently in scope for builderswork penetration detection. — context on demand 0
builderswork_list_structural_hosts List structural host elements (walls, floors, slabs, ceilings) that MEP services may need to penetrate. — context on demand 0

cancel_spec_generation_job Cancel a running specification generation job. — action on demand 1
chat_resolve_at_reference_to_project_or_model_item_by_display_name Resolve a user-typed '@' reference to a canonical project or model item. Revit context on demand 3
check_employer_requirements Check the current Revit model against Employer's Requirements (ERs). Reads an ER document and validates compliance. Supports JSON and text ER files. Use context tools (list_levels, list_systems, get_document_info, etc.) to check each requirement after reading. — context on demand 2
check_model_against_employer_requirements Check the current Revit model against Employer's Requirements (ERs). Reads an ER document and validates compliance. Supports JSON and text ER files. Use context tools (list_levels, list_systems, get_document_info, etc.) to check each requirement after reading. — context on demand 2

confirm_any_text_and_parameter_edits_with_user Present text, parameter, specification, schedule, or report changes to the user for — action on demand 3
conversation_search Search past conversation history by keyword. Returns matching exchanges with session IDs, timestamps, and relevant snippets. Use to recall what was discussed previously. — context on demand 2
conversation_search Search past conversation history by keyword. Returns matching exchanges with session IDs, timestamps, and relevant snippets. Use to recall what was discussed previously. — context on demand 2
convert_linked_rooms_to_host_mep_spaces Convert linked architectural rooms into host MEP spaces. — context on demand 1
create_dated_issued_drawings_folder Create a dated folder for issued drawings, e.g. \ Drawing exporter action on demand 2
create_formatted_excel_workbook_from_json Create a formatted Excel workbook (.xlsx) from structured JSON. — action on demand 2
create_formatted_word_document_from_json Create a formatted Word document (.docx) from structured JSON. — action on demand 3
create_sheet_export_group Create a new sheet group in the Drawing Exporter. Groups can contain explicit sheet numbers or use auto-filter rules. Drawing exporter action on demand 3
create_spec_generation_job Create and run a new specification generation job for the current project. Runs 11 agents in parallel respecting dependency order. — action on demand 1
debug_log Append an entry to the shared debug action log (Downloads/debug_action_log.md). Use during self-debug to track investigation progress. Debug action on demand 3
debug_status Get the current self-debug state: enabled, API key present, active agent, last test results, build server status. — context on demand 0
debug_status Get the current self-debug state: enabled, API key present, active agent, last test results, build server status. — context on demand 0
detect_ceiling_grid_tiles_and_free_points Detect ceiling tiles and likely-free tile points in current/active view. — context on demand 2
detect_project_folder_from_model_path Detect the project folder path based on the current Revit model location. Returns the detected path or an error if detection fails. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
detect_spec_model_clashes Run specification vs Revit model clash detection. Finds equipment mismatches, parameter differences, missing items. — action on demand 1
detection_find_external_unit_location_from_envelope detection_find_external_unit_location_from_envelope — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
detection_find_radiator_position_in_room Returns where a radiator belongs in a room per the ordered rule hierarchy. — context on demand 1
detection_find_wall_mount_location_by_category detection_find_wall_mount_location_by_category — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
detection_list_ceiling_tiles_in_current_view detection_list_ceiling_tiles_in_current_view — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
determine_level Determine which level an element or elevation belongs to based on level elevations. — calculator on demand 1
determine_view_position Calculate viewport placement positions for single/dual/grid layout. — context on demand 9
discover_commands Search for Revit commands by describing what you need to do. Returns command IDs, summaries, and usage hints. Use the returned command_id with execute_command to run the command. Example: 'create section views' returns SectionCreatorCommand etc. — context always 2
discover_skills Search for workflow skills — complete recipes that bundle commands, tools, and step-by-step instructions for complex tasks. Skills are the primary authority for how to accomplish a task. Example: 'set up model filters and templates' returns the Filters skill with all steps. — context always 2
discover_tools Search for MCP action tools by describing your objective. Returns tool names and descriptions. Call execute_tool(tool_name, params_json) to use any returned tool. Example: discover_tools('check clashes') returns check_clashes, navigate_to_clash etc. — context always 2
document_controller_add_iso7200_revision_clouds_to_pdf_at_detected_changes Embeds ISO 7200 revision cloud annotations onto a PDF at specified change regions. Returns annotated PDF path. — action on demand 4
document_controller_archive_superseded_drawing_revisions_to_archive_folder Moves old superseded revisions to an archive subfolder. Detects superseded files by comparing document numbers and revision codes. — action on demand 3
document_controller_build_date_matrix_drawing_issue_sheet_from_issued_folders Builds a JPA-format date-matrix drawing issue sheet (.xlsx) from scanned issued folders. Rows = documents, columns = issue dates, cells = revision at that date. — action on demand 3
document_controller_bulk_set_suitability_for_documents_on_cde_platform Sets suitability code (S0-S7) on multiple documents at once. Validates transition rules for each document before making API calls. — action on demand 3
document_controller_compare_two_pdf_drawing_revisions_and_detect_changes Compares old and new PDF revisions. Returns change regions with type (added/modified/removed), bounding boxes, and unbubbled change count. — context on demand 5
document_controller_connect_to_asite_cde_using_session_credentials Authenticates and connects to Asite CDE using username and password credentials. — action on demand 3
document_controller_connect_to_autodesk_forma_using_aps_oauth Authenticates and connects to Autodesk Forma/ACC using OAuth2 client credentials. — action on demand 3
document_controller_connect_to_viewpoint_for_projects_using_oauth Authenticates and connects to Viewpoint for Projects CDE using OAuth2 client credentials. — action on demand 3
document_controller_detect_naming_convention_type_from_drawing_filename Auto-detects which naming convention a filename follows: BS 1192, Uniclass 2015, NBS, Legacy UK, or custom. — context on demand 1
document_controller_detect_unbubbled_changes_and_add_revision_clouds_to_pdf Compares two PDF revisions, detects changes without revision clouds, and adds ISO 7200 revision cloud annotations to the new revision. — action on demand 3
document_controller_download_specific_revision_of_document_from_cde_platform Downloads a specific revision of a document from any connected CDE platform. Returns the local file path of the downloaded PDF/DWG. — action on demand 3
document_controller_export_drawing_register_to_excel_in_aec_format Exports a drawing register in standard AEC format to Excel. Columns: Drawing No, Title, Rev, Suitability, Date, Format, Scale. — action on demand 4
document_controller_extract_drawing_number_from_pdf_title_block Extracts drawing number from PDF title block using text scraping. Cross-references against filename. — context on demand 2
document_controller_generate_document_status_report_with_kpi_summary Generates a document status report with KPIs: counts by suitability stage, overdue documents, revision frequency, platform distribution, issue statistics. — context on demand 1
document_controller_generate_transmittal_issue_sheet_pdf_for_drawing_package Generates an A4 transmittal/issue sheet PDF with project header, document table, distribution list, and signature block. — action on demand 6
document_controller_get_cross_platform_audit_trail_for_document Returns complete audit trail for a document: uploads, downloads, status changes, comparisons, issues across all platforms. — context on demand 2
document_controller_get_full_metadata_and_revision_history_for_document Returns complete document detail: metadata, every revision with dates and uploaders, all issue records, audit trail. — context on demand 2
document_controller_get_issue_history_and_transmittal_references_for_document Returns document issue history: every transmittal it appeared in, with dates, purposes, recipients, and transmittal references. — context on demand 2
document_controller_get_master_document_register_for_project Returns the full master document register combining all CDE platforms, local scans, and incoming documents. Single source of truth. — context on demand 1
document_controller_get_revit_sheet_list_from_currently_open_model Gets the sheet list from the currently open Revit model via MEPBridge. Returns sheet numbers, names, and revision status. — context on demand 0
document_controller_issue_drawings_with_transmittal_to_recipients_on_platform Full issue workflow: select documents, generate transmittal PDF and Excel register, distribute to recipients on platform, log issue history. — action on demand 5
document_controller_list_documents_across_all_connected_cde_platforms Returns unified document list from all connected CDE platforms with code, title, revision, suitability, platform, date, originator. — context on demand 1
document_controller_list_suitability_codes_and_transitions_for_project Returns all suitability codes (S0-S7) with labels and allowed transitions. Includes project-specific overrides. — context on demand 1
document_controller_log_incoming_document_received_from_external_party Logs a document received from an external party. Validates naming, checks for duplicates, records in the incoming document register. — action on demand 7
document_controller_match_revit_sheets_to_exported_pdf_files_in_folder Cross-references Revit sheet numbers with exported PDF/DWG files in a folder. Shows which sheets are missing exports and which files have no matching sheet. — context on demand 1
document_controller_refresh_master_register_from_all_connected_sources Refreshes the master document register by querying all connected CDE platforms, scanning local folders, and incorporating incoming document logs. — action on demand 1
document_controller_rename_document_to_comply_with_bs1192_naming_convention Renames a document to comply with BS 1192/ISO 19650 naming convention. Validates the new name, renames on the platform, logs the change. — action on demand 3
document_controller_scan_connected_workspace_folder_for_drawing_files Scans a connected workspace folder for PDF/DWG drawing files. Returns parsed metadata and flags files not found in any CDE platform. — context on demand 1
document_controller_scan_local_issued_folder_for_drawings_by_date Scans a local or network folder for dated issued drawing subfolders. Returns files grouped by issue date with parsed document numbers and revisions. — context on demand 2
document_controller_search_documents_by_code_title_or_discipline Cross-platform search. Returns matching documents filtered by query text, discipline, platform, suitability. — context on demand 3
document_controller_send_issue_email_to_recipients_with_download_links Sends a transmittal email with HTML body containing document table and download links (SharePoint/GDrive) to specified recipients. — action on demand 7
document_controller_set_suitability_on_platform_with_transition_check Sets suitability code (S0-S7) on a document. Validates transition rules before making the API call. — action on demand 5
document_controller_sync_document_between_cde_platforms_with_metadata Downloads a document from one CDE platform and uploads it to another, mapping metadata between platforms. — action on demand 4
document_controller_upload_drawing_to_viewpoint_with_naming_validation Uploads a PDF drawing to Viewpoint for Projects. Validates naming, checks title block, compares with previous revision, pushes to VFP API. — action on demand 3
document_controller_upload_drawing_with_validation_comparison_and_clouds Complete upload workflow: validate naming, detect title block, compare with previous revision, add revision clouds if unbubbled changes found, then upload to platform. — action on demand 3
document_controller_upload_pdf_drawing_to_asite_cde_with_validation Uploads a PDF drawing to Asite CDE. Validates naming, checks title block, compares with previous revision, pushes to Asite API. — action on demand 4
document_controller_upload_pdf_drawing_to_autodesk_forma_with_validation Uploads a PDF drawing to Autodesk Forma/ACC. Validates naming, checks title block, pushes to APS Data Management API. — action on demand 4
document_controller_validate_filename_against_bs1192_naming_rules_for_project Validates a filename against BS 1192/ISO 19650 naming convention. Returns field-by-field pass/fail breakdown. — context on demand 3
drawing_exporter_add_revision Add a revision to sheets before export. Creates a Revit revision and optionally assigns it to specific sheets. Drawing exporter action on demand 5
drawing_exporter_apply_renames Apply all queued sheet rename operations to the Revit model. Use drawing_exporter_rename_sheets first to queue renames. Drawing exporter action on demand 0
drawing_exporter_create_group Create a new sheet group in the Drawing Exporter. Groups can contain explicit sheet numbers or use auto-filter rules. Drawing exporter action on demand 3
drawing_exporter_create_issued_folder Create a dated folder for issued drawings, e.g. \ Drawing exporter action on demand 2
drawing_exporter_detect_project_folder Detect the project folder path based on the current Revit model location. Returns the detected path or an error if detection fails. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_execute_export Execute the drawing export with the current settings and selected sheets. Requires explicit confirmation. Returns export results including success/failure per sheet. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_generate_register Generate a drawing register (spreadsheet) from the current sheet data. Optionally specify output path and template. Drawing exporter action on demand 2
drawing_exporter_get_dwg_presets Get all available DWG export presets. Returns preset names that can be used with drawing_exporter_set_dwg_preset. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_get_groups Get all sheet groups from the Drawing Exporter. Returns group names and their member sheets. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_get_register_data Get the drawing register data including sheet numbers, names, revisions, and issue history. Used to preview what will appear in the exported register. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_get_selection Get the currently selected sheets in the Drawing Exporter. Returns an array of selected sheet objects. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_get_settings Get the current export settings from the Drawing Exporter, including format, naming pattern, output folder, merge/compress options, and DWG preset. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_get_summary Get a high-level summary of the Drawing Exporter state: total sheets, selected count, export format, output folder, and readiness status. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
drawing_exporter_load_configuration Load a previously saved Drawing Exporter configuration by name. Restores all settings, selections, and groups. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_open_issued_folder Open the issued drawings folder in Windows Explorer. Opens the most recent issued folder or the base output folder. Drawing exporter action on demand 0
drawing_exporter_read_sheets Read sheets from the Drawing Exporter. Returns sheet list and selected sheets. Supports filtering by revision, prefix, discipline, group, selection status, or export status. Drawing exporter context on demand 1
drawing_exporter_rename_sheets Queue sheet rename operations. Renames are staged and applied with drawing_exporter_apply_renames. Provide a JSON array of mappings. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_save_configuration Save the current Drawing Exporter settings (format, naming, output folder, groups, selections) as a named configuration for reuse. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_select_sheets Select or deselect sheets in the Drawing Exporter. Can select by sheet numbers, prefix, discipline, group, or select/deselect all. Mode controls whether selection replaces, adds to, or removes from current selection. Drawing exporter action on demand 7
drawing_exporter_set_dwg_preset Set the DWG export preset. Use drawing_exporter_get_dwg_presets to list available presets first. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_set_format Set the export format for the Drawing Exporter. Valid values: \ Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_set_merge_compress Set merge (combine PDFs into one file) and compress (zip output) options for the Drawing Exporter. Drawing exporter action on demand 2
drawing_exporter_set_naming_pattern Set the file naming pattern for exported drawings. Supports placeholders like {SheetNumber}, {SheetName}, {Revision}, {Date}. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_set_output_folder Set the output folder for exported drawings. Use \ Drawing exporter action on demand 1
drawing_exporter_update_group Update an existing sheet group by adding or removing sheets. Drawing exporter action on demand 3
