error_manager_get_error_check_summary_from_latest_run_on_active_model Get summary of the last error check run. Returns counts by group and severity. Revit context on demand 0
error_manager_get_error_results_from_latest_run_by_navigator_group Get error results filtered by navigator group. Revit context on demand 1
error_manager_list_all_discoverable_error_checking_rules List all available error checking rules with their groups and descriptions. Revit context on demand 0
error_manager_list_saved_rule_sets_in_project_and_user_folders List all available error rule sets (project and user level). Revit context on demand 0
error_manager_resolve_entry_by_guid resolve_error — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
error_manager_run_all_discoverable_rules_on_active_model Run ALL error checking rules against the current model and return a consolidated test report. Revit action on demand 3
error_manager_run_single_rule_on_active_model_by_rule_name Run a single error checking rule by name and return results as JSON. Revit context on demand 2
error_warning_manager_get_summary_dashboard Aggregate dashboard for the Warnings + Error Manager UI (NOT QA Manager). Returns counts per wire-type, top 5 sources, severity breakdown, and recent unresolved entries. Combines ErrorWire.GetSummary with Document.GetWarnings. — context on demand 0
error_wiring_mark_wire_error_resolved_by_guid Mark an error as resolved/acknowledged. Use after the user has seen and accepted the error. — action on demand 1
execute_command Execute a Revit command by its ID. Use this when you need to perform an action in the user's Revit model. Revit action on demand 2
execute_command Execute a Revit command by its ID. Use this when you need to perform an action in the user's Revit model. Revit action on demand 2
execute_drawing_export_to_pdf_or_dwg Execute the drawing export with the current settings and selected sheets. Requires explicit confirmation. Returns export results including success/failure per sheet. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
execute_tool Call any MCP tool by name. Use after discover_tools returns tool names. Pass the tool name and a JSON object of parameters. Example: execute_tool(tool_name='check_clashes', params_json='{\ — action always 2
export_clashes_xml Export clash detection results to XML format. Reads from a clash JSON file and produces an XML report compatible with Navisworks and BIM 360. — action on demand 2
export_elements_as_json_by_category_or_room Export lightweight JSON of elements (equipment, fixtures, etc.) by category, family name, room, space, or X/Y/Z. Use to see IDs and positions then select_by_ids or family_swap. — context on demand 11
export_spec_to_cobie Export equipment data to COBie spreadsheet for BIM handover. — action on demand 2
export_spec_to_pdf Export the specification to a PDF document. Supports DRAFT watermarks and bookmarks. — action on demand 3
export_spec_to_word Export the specification to a .docx Word document with WSP-format styling. — action on demand 3
family_swap Swap a family instance to another family or family type. The element must be a family instance; the target family and type must already be loaded in the document. Use list_families to discover loaded families and types. Revit action on demand 3
family_swap_get_smart_mapping_suggestions Returns smart mapping suggestions (source→target type) using SmartMapCadBlockToRevitFamily heuristics. — context on demand 0
family_swap_list_candidate_replacements_for_type Given a source FamilyInstance type, list candidate replacement family types (in-model, in user/business folders, downloadable from Supabase). — context on demand 0
family_swap_list_instances_grouped_by_type List FamilyInstance ids in the model grouped by Family + Type — feeds the source list panel. — context on demand 0
family_swap_list_parameter_mapping Returns the source→target parameter mapping that FamilySwapParameterMapper proposes for a given pair (name match + fuzzy + user overrides). — context on demand 0
filter_scope_boxes_by_name_pattern Filter scope boxes by name contains pattern. — context on demand 2
filter_scope_boxes_containing_model_elements Filter scope boxes to only those containing model elements. — context on demand 3
filter_template_manager_determine_template_for_view Resolve which view template to apply to a new view based on discipline (e.g. Drainage) and scale denominator (e.g. 100). Returns the template id and matched name. — context on demand 2
find_closest_gridline_to_point Find the closest gridline to a point or room centroid. — context on demand 3
find_elements_by_id Find elements by id list and return lightweight metadata. — context on demand 1
find_room_centroid Find the centroid of a room by roomId/number/name. — context on demand 3
find_wall_normal_from_room_centroid Find wall normal and section direction from a room centroid. — context on demand 1
find_walls_from_room_boundary Get boundary walls for a room with facing-direction hints. — context on demand 2
finish_branch Branch agent self-terminator. Call this LAST, after applying all changes, to set the result summary, close the tool window, and return control to the parent chat which will auto-resume. Only available inside branch sessions (Parameter Editor, Drawing Exporter). — action always 2
free_viewport_space_calculator Calculate available viewport space on a sheet/titleblock. — context on demand 2
functionality_wiring_run_live_ui_sweep Live UI toggle sweep — for every Phase-8 fixed item, press the UI control via ui_toggle_assert_wire and confirm the expected C# wire fires. Surfaces each press in the error panel as a WireRecoverable timeline entry. Skipped items are reported as 'requires_live_revit'. — action always 2
functionality_wiring_run_live_workflow_demo Run a curated workflow demo against the live BridgeRegistry, wiring each step through ErrorManager so the error panel shows the timeline. Demos: swvs-demo-create-floor-plan, epm-demo-summary-dashboard, tag-demo-smart-place-tag, ws-demo-list-with-degrade, cobie-demo-list-component. — action always 2
functionality_wiring_run_self_test Run the Functionality Wiring self-test harness. Verifies MCP registry entries, command manifest, bridge action parity, error wiring, skill YAML, and domain naming for every agent (00 through 15). Returns the parsed JSON report and the paths to the on-disk Markdown + JSON artefacts. — action always 3
functionality_wiring_run_workflow_corpus Run the 300-workflow × 10-agent simulator over the Functionality Wiring corpus. Returns consensus totals (passed/flaky/failed) and the JSON + Markdown report paths. This corpus is separately registered and deletable: see tools/tests/wiring/workflows/README.md. — action always 2
generate_drawing_register_spreadsheet Generate a drawing register (spreadsheet) from the current sheet data. Optionally specify output path and template. Drawing exporter action on demand 2
get_available_dwg_export_presets Get all available DWG export presets. Returns preset names that can be used with drawing_exporter_set_dwg_preset. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_central_warning_log_entries Get entries from the central warning log. Filter by source command or log level (Info/Warning/Error/Critical). — context on demand 3
get_central_warning_log_summary Summary of the central warning log: count by level, top 5 sources, last 10 entries. — context on demand 0
get_company_brand_profile Read the current company brand profile: name, template, fonts, colours, approved manufacturers. — context on demand 0
get_configured_template_project_file_path Returns the configured template .rvt file path from three-tier config resolution (project, user, business). — context on demand 0
get_current_export_settings Get the current export settings from the Drawing Exporter, including format, naming pattern, output folder, merge/compress options, and DWG preset. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_current_template_filters Get the filter settings applied to the current view template. — context on demand 0
get_current_template_visibility Get category visibility settings for the current view template. — context on demand 0
get_current_view Get the current active view name, type (floor plan/ceiling plan/section/3D), associated level name and elevation. Does not recognise sheets — switch to a floor plan or section. — context on demand 0
get_current_view_level Get the level name and elevation for the current active view. — context on demand 0
get_current_view_level_height Get the floor-to-floor height from the current view level. — context on demand 0
get_current_view_range Get view range settings (cut plane, top, bottom offsets) for the current view. — context on demand 0
get_currently_selected_sheets_for_export Get the currently selected sheets in the Drawing Exporter. Returns an array of selected sheet objects. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_document_info Get information about the current Revit document. Returns JSON with title, available levels, and summary of loaded families. Revit context on demand 0
get_document_info Get information about the current Revit document. Returns JSON with title, available levels, and summary of loaded families. Revit context on demand 0
get_drawing_exporter_status_summary Get a high-level summary of the Drawing Exporter state: total sheets, selected count, export format, output folder, and readiness status. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_drawing_register_data_with_revisions Get the drawing register data including sheet numbers, names, revisions, and issue history. Used to preview what will appear in the exported register. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_element_parameters Stage 3: get parameter values for selected parameter names (instance + optional type/family fallback). — context on demand 3
get_element_summary Stage 1 lightweight summary for selected or requested elements. — context on demand 2
get_elements_by_filter Query lightweight element summaries for a named view filter. — context on demand 3
get_elements_by_workset Query lightweight element summaries for a named workset. — context on demand 3
get_elements_in_space List lightweight element summaries that sit inside a target MEP space. — context on demand 4
get_error_log Get all errors from the current session. Returns cable_id, wire type, message, source class, timestamp, resolved status. These are suggestions for debugging — reject if not relevant. — context on demand 3
get_error_log Return the in-memory ErrorManager wire log. Optional filters: wire_type (recoverable|error|fault), source_class, limit (default 50). — context always 3
get_error_summary Get error counts by wire type and top offending classes. Quick health check after running commands. — context on demand 0
get_error_summary Aggregate error-wire counts: total, recoverable, error, fault, unresolved + top source classes. — context always 0
get_family_parameters_and_values Get ALL parameter names and values from selected elements or by ID. Returns every instance and type parameter with current value, storage type, and whether writable. For titleblocks, includes sheet parameters like Checked By and Designed By. Call this before set_parameter_values to see what is available. Revit context on demand 3
get_family_parameters_and_values Get ALL parameter names and values from selected elements or by ID. Returns every instance and type parameter with current value, storage type, and whether writable. For titleblocks, includes sheet parameters like Checked By and Designed By. Call this before set_parameter_values to see what is available. Revit context on demand 3
get_floor_slab_level Find nearest floor slab elevation for a level or elevation. — context on demand 3
get_parameters Read all parameters from any Revit element(s) by ElementId. Returns every parameter with its name, current value, type, and whether it's writable. For titleblocks, also returns the owning sheet's parameters (Checked By, Designed By, etc.). Always call this first before setting parameters so you can see what's actually available and pick the right one contextually. Revit context on demand 2
get_parameters Read all parameters from any Revit element(s) by ElementId. Returns every parameter with its name, current value, type, and whether it's writable. For titleblocks, also returns the owning sheet's parameters (Checked By, Designed By, etc.). Always call this first before setting parameters so you can see what's actually available and pick the right one contextually. Revit context on demand 2
get_revit_warning_count_summary_for_health_check Quick health check: total warning count, severity breakdown, top 5 warning types. Revit context on demand 0
get_revit_warnings_grouped_by_failure_type Get model warnings grouped by failure definition type with count per type. Revit context on demand 0
get_rooms_in_view Get all rooms visible in the current view. Returns room name, number, level, area. — context on demand 0
get_selection Get the current Revit selection. Returns JSON with count and array of selected elements (id, category, familyName, typeName). Revit context on demand 0
get_selection Get the current Revit selection. Returns JSON with count and array of selected elements (id, category, familyName, typeName). Revit context on demand 0
get_sheet_export_groups Get all sheet groups from the Drawing Exporter. Returns group names and their member sheets. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
get_sheets_containing_revision Returns all sheets that have a specific revision assigned. Reverse lookup: given a revision ID, which sheets include it? — context on demand 1
get_sheets_missing_revision Returns all sheets that do NOT have a specific revision assigned. Answers: which sheets still need this revision? — context on demand 1
get_spec_applicable_standards Look up applicable British Standards, CIBSE guides, Building Regulations, and HTM guidance for a discipline or building type. — context on demand 2
get_spec_change_log Read the golden thread audit trail: decisions, changes, QA resolutions, exports. — context on demand 1
get_spec_compliance_report Read compliance validation results: overall score, discipline scores, findings, and QA items. — context on demand 1
get_spec_design_parameters Read design parameters for the current project: heating, cooling, ventilation, controls, and electrical configurations. — context on demand 0
get_spec_equipment_data Search equipment database by type, manufacturer, or discipline. Returns catalogue data for spec inclusion. — context on demand 2
get_spec_job Read a specification job's status, agent states, and output summary. — context on demand 1
get_spec_project_context Read current specification project context: building type, disciplines, design parameters, system configurations. — context on demand 0
get_spec_qa_findings Get all QA findings: cross-section inconsistencies, parameter conflicts, standards mismatches. Shows status (open, accepted, overridden, flagged). — context on demand 1
get_spec_version_diff Compare two specification versions showing added, removed, and modified clauses, standards, and parameters. — context on demand 2
get_transfer_standards_history_for_project Returns the transfer history for the current project: what was transferred, when, from which source. — context on demand 0
get_unresolved_errors Get all unresolved errors that need attention. Returns errors not yet acknowledged. — context on demand 0
get_unresolved_errors Return error-wire entries with Resolved == false. Optional limit (default 50). — context always 1
get_user_preferences Read the user's saved preferences (measurement units, MEP standard, view scale, AI response detail, etc.). Returns all preferences or a specific one by key. — context on demand 1
get_user_preferences Read the user's saved preferences (measurement units, MEP standard, view scale, AI response detail, etc.). Returns all preferences or a specific one by key. — context on demand 1
get_view_filter_settings Get all filters applied to a view with their complete settings including visibility, graphic overrides, categories, and filter rules. — context on demand 1
get_warnings_for_specific_element_ids Get warnings affecting specific element IDs. Returns all warnings where the given elements are involved. Revit context on demand 1
get_warnings_with_available_auto_resolutions Get only warnings that have auto-fix resolutions available from Revit. Revit context on demand 0
import_spec_survey_data Import survey data from PDF or Excel into the project context for specification generation. — action on demand 1
inject_chat_message Type and send a message in a chat WebView2. Optionally animates typing character-by-character. Use for agent handoff: open specialist window, then inject continuation prompt. — action on demand 3
inject_chat_message Type and send a message in a chat WebView2. Optionally animates typing character-by-character. Use for agent handoff: open specialist window, then inject continuation prompt. — action on demand 3
launch_cloud_agent_to_fix_code Launch a Cursor Cloud Agent to fix code. Provide the prompt with evidence and fix instructions. Returns agent ID for polling. Debug action on demand 2
layout_preview_plantroom_solve_with_preset layout_preview_plantroom_solve_with_preset — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
layout_report_last_solver_run_details layout_report_last_solver_run_details — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
link_spec_to_contract Link specification sections to NEC4, JCT, or FIDIC contract items. — action on demand 2
list_all_active_revit_model_warnings List all active Revit model warnings with message, severity, element IDs, category, and resolution availability. Revit context on demand 2
list_annotations List lightweight annotation context in active view (text, tags, generic annotations, bounds, leaders). — context on demand 0
list_comms Filter rooms to comms/data rooms by room-name patterns (host or links). — context on demand 0
list_corridors List all corridor rooms detected by name pattern. — context on demand 0
list_doors List all doors with family, type, host wall, and room from/to. — context on demand 0
list_element_parameters Stage 2: list parameter names available on each element (instance + optional type/family). — context on demand 3
list_families List loaded families with lightweight type summary. — context on demand 3
list_filters List all view filters in the document. — context on demand 0
list_grid_angles List all grids with their angles for section orientation. — context on demand 0
list_grids List all grids in the document with name and direction. — context on demand 0
list_levels List all levels in the document with name and elevation in mm. — context on demand 0
list_line_styles List available detail line styles in the document. — context on demand 0
list_linked_rooms List rooms from linked architectural models. — context on demand 0
list_model_groups List all model groups with name, count, and member elements. — context on demand 0
list_parameters List all shared and project parameters in the document. — context on demand 0
list_plant_rooms List all plant rooms detected by name pattern. — context on demand 0
list_recent_transfer_source_files Returns the last 5 source .rvt files used for transfer, with existence validation. — context on demand 0
list_region_types List filled region types available in the document. — context on demand 0
list_revision_clouds_in_model_or_sheet Lists all revision clouds in the model or on a specific sheet. Returns cloud ID, associated revision, view, and sheet. — context on demand 1
list_revisions List all revisions with sequence, date, description, issued status. — context on demand 0
list_risers List all riser elements in the model. — context on demand 0
list_rooms List all rooms in the model with name, number, level, area. — context on demand 2
list_rooms List all rooms in the model (host + linked). Returns name, number, level, area for each room. — context on demand 2
list_scope_boxes List all scope boxes with name and bounds. — context on demand 0
list_service_types List unique service type values found on model elements. — context on demand 0
list_sheets List all sheets in the document with number and name. — context on demand 0
list_space_names List MEP spaces with lightweight name/number/level metadata. — context on demand 1
list_spec_jobs List all specification generation jobs for the current project with status and timestamps. — context on demand 0
list_system_types List MEP system type definitions (pipe, duct, electrical). — context on demand 0
list_tags List all tag families loaded in the document. — context on demand 0
list_templates List all view templates in the document. — context on demand 0
list_text List all text note types in the document. — context on demand 0
list_titleblock_parameters List parameters on a titleblock instance (sheet/revision fields). — context on demand 3
list_titleblocks List titleblock instances with sheet and family/type info. — context on demand 1
list_transferable_standard_categories_from_source List all transferable standard categories from a source .rvt file with item counts per category. — context on demand 1
list_views List all views in the document with name, type, and level. — context on demand 0
list_worksets List all worksets with name and visibility. — context on demand 0
load_saved_export_configuration_by_name Load a previously saved Drawing Exporter configuration by name. Restores all settings, selections, and groups. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
navigate_to_clash Navigate the Revit view to show a clash location. Selects both clashing elements and zooms to fit them in a section box. Revit action on demand 2
network_build_connected_component_graph_for_selection network_build_connected_component_graph_for_selection — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
network_identify_end_run_connectors_in_system network_identify_end_run_connectors_in_system — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
network_identify_primary_edges_in_clash_group network_identify_primary_edges_in_clash_group — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
network_walk_downstream_from_terminals_accumulating_flow network_walk_downstream_from_terminals_accumulating_flow — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
object_styles_list_category_graphic_styles List Object Styles for every model + annotation + import category. Returns per-category line weight (projection/cut), line colour, line pattern name, material name. Mirror of the Revit Manage > Object Styles dialog. — context on demand 1
object_styles_list_fill_patterns List all FillPatternElement entries (drafting + model). Returns id, name, target, host orientation, scale. — context on demand 1
object_styles_list_halftone_underlay_settings Return the project's halftone / underlay graphic settings (line weight, line pattern, halftone toggle, brightness, applies-to halftone). — context on demand 0
object_styles_list_line_patterns List all LinePatternElement entries: id, name, segment definition. — context on demand 0
object_styles_list_line_styles List all line styles (subcategories of OST_Lines). Returns name, line weight, colour, pattern. — context on demand 0
object_styles_list_line_weight_table Return the project's 1–16 pen-table for model line weights and a per-scale matrix. Mirrors Manage > Additional Settings > Line Weights. — context on demand 0
object_styles_list_materials List all Material elements with appearance + thermal + structural asset ids. Returns id, name, class, colour, asset triple. — context on demand 0
obtain_room_boundary_walls Get room boundary dimensions and wall direction summaries. — context on demand 2
open_issued_drawings_folder_in_explorer Open the issued drawings folder in Windows Explorer. Opens the most recent issued folder or the base output folder. Drawing exporter action on demand 0
parameter_editor_apply Commit dirty Parameter Editor rows to the Revit model. Parameter editor action on demand 0
parameter_editor_read Read rows from the Parameter Editor grid. Returns items and selectedRows. Parameter editor context on demand 1
parameter_editor_update Update Parameter Editor rows by updates array OR filter+changes. Grid-only changes; use parameter_editor_apply to commit. Parameter editor action on demand 3
pipework_get_rotation_axis_from_selected_reference_pipe PipeworkGetRotationAxisFromSelectedReferencePipe — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
pipework_list_connected_elements_for_selected_fitting_or_pipe PipeworkListConnectedElementsForSelectedFittingOrPipe — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
plantroom_get_preset_overlay_for_room_category plantroom_get_preset_overlay_for_room_category — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
plantroom_get_room_geometry_for_selected_room Plantroom read tool — see Features Plan §8 Plantroom bucket. — context on demand 0
plantroom_list_equipment_library_items_with_optional_filter Plantroom read tool — see Features Plan §8 Plantroom bucket. — context on demand 0
plantroom_list_equipment_requirements_for_room plantroom_list_equipment_requirements_for_room — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
plantroom_parse_equipment_free_text_via_llm_mcp_tool Plantroom read tool — see Features Plan §8 Plantroom bucket. — context on demand 0
plantroom_preset_extraction_mcp_tool_service Plantroom read tool — see Features Plan §8 Plantroom bucket. — context on demand 0
plantroom_report_last_solve_placements_for_room plantroom_report_last_solve_placements_for_room — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
poll_cloud_agent_fix_status Poll the Cursor Cloud Agent for status. Returns CREATING/RUNNING/FINISHED/ERROR. When FINISHED, includes conversation summary. Debug context on demand 1
preview_transferable_items_in_category_from_source List specific named items within a single category from a source .rvt file. — context on demand 2
project_settings_get_all_project_settings_overview Aggregate read of every Project Settings card (information, units, starting view, location, shared parameter file path). — context on demand 0
project_settings_get_project_information Read all editable Project Information fields: number, name, client name, status, building name, address, organization name + description, project issue date. — context on demand 0
project_settings_get_project_location Read the active SiteLocation: latitude, longitude, time zone, elevation. — context on demand 0
project_settings_get_project_units Read the project's units. Returns the FormatOptions for each SpecTypeId (length, area, volume, mass, etc.). — context on demand 0
project_settings_get_shared_parameter_file_path Read the application-scoped shared parameter file path. — context on demand 0
project_settings_get_starting_view Read the configured Starting View id and name. — context on demand 0
qa_manager_add_or_remove_family_exception_on_error_rule_in_rule_set_json QA Manager rule exception editor: add or remove a bespoke family / type / system-type exception on an Error Manager rule INSIDE a named RuleSet JSON (not globally on the rule class). Targets property_name = ExcludedFamilyTypes | ExcludedFamilies | ExcludedSystemTypes | ExcludedTypes. Refuses to overwrite malformed existing lists. Default create_if_missing=false so a typo in rule_name surfaces as an error. Revit action on demand 8
qa_manager_agentic_bridge_control QA Manager agentic bridge control: start / stop / status of the polling loop that lets external agents (Cursor Cloud, CI, any MCP client) drive QA workflows against this Revit session via a Supabase queue. Requires env vars MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_URL, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_KEY, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_BRIDGE_SECRET. Only the allowlist of QA / error / clash / export commands can be dispatched — arbitrary execute_command is rejected. — action on demand 1
qa_manager_agentic_bridge_queue_workflow_step Queue a single QA Manager command (run_error_check / clash detection / capture / export / import etc.) into the Supabase agentic_qa_queue table for a remote Revit session running the polling bridge to execute. Requires env vars MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_URL, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_KEY, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_BRIDGE_SECRET. Returns the correlation_id immediately; when wait_seconds > 0 the tool polls agentic_qa_results until the remote session posts the outcome. — action on demand 4
qa_manager_create_clash_report_from_detection_in_scope QA Manager workflow: run a clash detection sweep in the chosen scope (view | selection | filters | worksets) → optionally capture screenshots → export the clash report in any mix of excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Single-call workflow replacement for manually chaining RunClashDetection*Command + CaptureAllClashResultImages + ExportClashResults*. Revit action on demand 6
qa_manager_create_error_report_using_saved_rules QA Manager workflow: run Error Manager rule engine (optionally with a saved rule set) → optionally capture screenshots → export a full error report in any combination of excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Single-call replacement for manually chaining ErrorManagerRunErrorCheckCommand + CaptureAllClashResultImages + ExportClashResults*. Revit action on demand 3
qa_manager_create_or_update_custom_error_rule_in_rule_set_json QA Manager rule authoring: create or update an Error Manager rule inside a named RuleSet JSON. Two rule_kinds: 'expression' (parameter AND/OR chain applied to the built-in Check Custom rule) | 'property_overrides' (reuse any existing IErrorRule class and override its settings, eg minimum distance). Saves to project .mepbridge/errors/rules/<name>.json AND/OR %APPDATA%/BuildMEP/RuleSets/<name>.json. Upserts by RuleName so repeat calls update rather than duplicate. Revit action on demand 9
qa_manager_get_error_context_by_id Resolve one or more QA Manager finding ids (e.g. ERR-001, ERR-003) back to their full JSON rows so the chat can reason over the finding's description, element ids, category, level, severity, status and location. Read-only; no Revit transaction. Pair with the @mention palette: when the user inserts `@ERR-001` the LLM calls this tool to pull the rest of the context without re-running the rule engine. QAManager context on demand 1
qa_manager_list_pushed_forma_issues qa_manager_list_pushed_forma_issues — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
qa_manager_manage_scheduled_error_check_sweeps_per_project_and_user QA Manager scheduled QA sweep manager: CRUD + run_now on recurring Error Manager error-check sweeps fired by an in-process timer. Cadence grammar: every_N_minutes | daily_HH:MM | weekly_DOW_HH:MM | once_ISO8601. Each schedule can attach a rule set, capture images, and auto-export to excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Persists to .mepbridge/qa/schedules.json (project) with %APPDATA%/BuildMEP/QA fallback (user). Revit action on demand 8
qa_manager_run_smoke_test_for_error_check_capture_and_export_pipeline QA Manager smoke test: runs the Error Manager rule engine → captures screenshots → exports every report format (Excel, XML, HTML, PDF, Word) → validates every artefact landed on disk. Returns a matrix of step/status/path/duration so the AI can diagnose broken wiring. Revit action on demand 4
qa_manager_supabase_family_probe_download_or_run_error_rules_on_instances QA Manager ↔ Supabase bridge. Three modes. mode=list: probe the Supabase families bucket for a category + fuzzy candidates (no Revit mutation). mode=download: fetch the .rfa into the persistent %APPDATA% family cache. mode=run_rules_on_loaded_family: run every relevant Error Manager rule against instances of the family already in the model and return a pass/fail matrix scoped to that family. Revit action on demand 4
queue_sheet_rename_operations Queue sheet rename operations. Renames are staged and applied with drawing_exporter_apply_renames. Provide a JSON array of mappings. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
read_file Read the contents of a text file. Returns the text. Blocked for binary files (.exe, .dll, .rvt, images). Use 'offset' and 'limit' for large files. — context on demand 3
read_file Read the contents of a text file. Returns the text. Blocked for binary files (.exe, .dll, .rvt, images). Use 'offset' and 'limit' for large files. — context on demand 3
read_memory Read Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (user prefs, business logic, skillset), 'domain' (discipline-specific — provide domain key like '63_lighting'), 'chat' (this conversation), 'all'. Use 'list_domains' scope to see available domain folders. — context on demand 3
read_memory Read Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (user prefs, business logic, skillset), 'domain' (discipline-specific — provide domain key like '63_lighting'), 'chat' (this conversation), 'all'. Use 'list_domains' scope to see available domain folders. — context on demand 3
read_parameter_editor_grid_rows Read rows from the Parameter Editor grid. Returns items and selectedRows. Parameter editor context on demand 1
read_revision_cache_from_local_json Reads the local JSON revision cache (sheets + revisions) without needing the model open. Returns cached data or null if no cache exists. — context on demand 0
read_revision_staging_state_from_drawing_exporter Returns the current revision staging state from the Drawing Exporter: selected revision, staged sheet count, checklist summary, and form field values. Drawing exporter context on demand 0
read_sheets_from_drawing_exporter Read sheets from the Drawing Exporter. Returns sheet list and selected sheets. Supports filtering by revision, prefix, discipline, group, selection status, or export status. Drawing exporter context on demand 1
recent_chats Retrieve recent conversation exchanges. Optionally filter by time range. Use to review what was discussed recently or during a specific period. — context on demand 4
recent_chats Retrieve recent conversation exchanges. Optionally filter by time range. Use to review what was discussed recently or during a specific period. — context on demand 4
refresh_webview2_chat_ui Refresh the WebView2 chat UI to pick up HTML/CSS/JS changes from the source directory. Debug action on demand 0
regenerate_spec_section Re-generate a single discipline section after a context or parameter change. — action on demand 1
reject_fix Reject the cloud agent's fix. With followup_text, sends new instructions. Without it, deletes the agent. Debug action on demand 2
reject_fix Reject the cloud agent's fix. With followup_text, sends new instructions. Without it, deletes the agent. Debug action on demand 2
reload_dll Signal that a new DLL build is ready. Commands routed through AddInManager will automatically use the new code. MCP tool C# logic requires chat close/reopen. Debug action on demand 0
reload_ui Refresh the WebView2 chat UI to pick up HTML/CSS/JS changes from the source directory. Debug action on demand 0
resolve_error Mark an error as resolved/acknowledged. Use after the user has seen and accepted the error. — action on demand 1
resolve_spec_qa_finding Accept, override, or flag a QA finding for engineer review. Updates the golden thread audit trail. — action on demand 4
routing_preferences_list_all_rules List all configured routing-preference rules per service type and discipline (pipe, duct, cable tray, sizing rules). — context on demand 0
run_j3_wiring_self_test Internal: J3 wiring self-test executor. Not for direct use. — debug on demand 3
run_self_test_checklist Run the self-test checklist. Returns pass/fail summary. Use to verify tools and commands work. Optionally filter by section or test_id. Debug action on demand 3
run_spec_compliance_check Run full compliance validation against 60+ standards. Returns overall score 0-100, per-discipline scores, and findings. — action on demand 1
save_current_export_configuration Save the current Drawing Exporter settings (format, naming, output folder, groups, selections) as a named configuration for reuse. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
search_files Search for files by name pattern or content text within allowed directories. Returns matching file paths and (for content search) the matching lines. — context on demand 4
search_files Search for files by name pattern or content text within allowed directories. Returns matching file paths and (for content search) the matching lines. — context on demand 4
search_parameters Search all parameters on elements for a text value. Checks element name, family name, type name, and all parameter values. — context on demand 2
search_spec_clause_library Search the clause library by keyword, discipline, Uniclass code, building type, or clause type. — context on demand 4
select_by_ids Set Revit selection to the given element IDs. Use after export_equipment_json to select specific elements by ID (e.g. one radiator from the list). Revit action on demand 1
select_by_ids Set Revit selection to the given element IDs. Use after export_equipment_json to select specific elements by ID (e.g. one radiator from the list). Revit action on demand 1
select_by_location Get elements at or near a point (X/Y/Z in mm). Returns lightweight JSON. Optionally set Revit selection to those elements. Revit action on demand 5
select_by_location Get elements at or near a point (X/Y/Z in mm). Returns lightweight JSON. Optionally set Revit selection to those elements. Revit action on demand 5
select_by_room Get elements inside an architectural room by room number or name. Returns lightweight JSON (id, category, name). Optionally set Revit selection to those elements. Revit action on demand 3
select_by_room Get elements inside an architectural room by room number or name. Returns lightweight JSON (id, category, name). Optionally set Revit selection to those elements. Revit action on demand 3
select_sheets_for_export_by_criteria Select or deselect sheets in the Drawing Exporter. Can select by sheet numbers, prefix, discipline, group, or select/deselect all. Mode controls whether selection replaces, adds to, or removes from current selection. Drawing exporter action on demand 7
self_test Run the self-test checklist. Returns pass/fail summary. Use to verify tools and commands work. Optionally filter by section or test_id. Debug action on demand 3
set_dwg_export_preset Set the DWG export preset. Use drawing_exporter_get_dwg_presets to list available presets first. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
set_export_format_pdf_or_dwg Set the export format for the Drawing Exporter. Valid values: \ Drawing exporter action on demand 1
set_export_merge_and_compress_options Set merge (combine PDFs into one file) and compress (zip output) options for the Drawing Exporter. Drawing exporter action on demand 2
set_export_output_folder Set the output folder for exported drawings. Use \ Drawing exporter action on demand 1
set_exported_file_naming_pattern Set the file naming pattern for exported drawings. Supports placeholders like {SheetNumber}, {SheetName}, {Revision}, {Date}. Drawing exporter action on demand 1
set_parameter_values Set parameter values on elements. Call get_family_parameters_and_values first to see available parameters and pick the right one contextually. For titleblocks, sheet parameters like Checked By and Designed By are resolved automatically. — context on demand 2
set_parameter_values Set parameter values on elements. Call get_family_parameters_and_values first to see available parameters and pick the right one contextually. For titleblocks, sheet parameters like Checked By and Designed By are resolved automatically. — context on demand 2
set_parameters Set parameter values on any Revit element(s). Call get_parameters first to see what's available, then use your judgement to pick the parameter that best matches the user's intent. For titleblocks, sheet-level parameters like Checked By or Designed By are resolved automatically. Input is a JSON array of updates with elementId and parameter name:value pairs. Revit action on demand 1
set_parameters Set parameter values on any Revit element(s). Call get_parameters first to see what's available, then use your judgement to pick the parameter that best matches the user's intent. For titleblocks, sheet-level parameters like Checked By or Designed By are resolved automatically. Input is a JSON array of updates with elementId and parameter name:value pairs. Revit action on demand 1
set_spec_design_parameter Set or update a design parameter value for the current project. — action on demand 2
set_spec_manufacturer_preferences Set approved manufacturers and clause preferences for the specification. — action on demand 1
sheet_view_setup_list_available_titleblock_family_types List available titleblock family types loaded in the document, plus those discoverable in the user/business family folders. — context on demand 0
signal_new_dll_ready_for_hot_reload Signal that a new DLL build is ready. Commands routed through AddInManager will automatically use the new code. MCP tool C# logic requires chat close/reopen. Debug action on demand 0
snapshot_apply Apply all pending parameter changes to the Revit model in a single transaction. Call snapshot_review first to inspect changes. Set validate_only to true for a dry run that checks feasibility without modifying the model. Revit snapshot on demand 1
snapshot_apply Apply all pending parameter changes to the Revit model in a single transaction. Call snapshot_review first to inspect changes. Set validate_only to true for a dry run that checks feasibility without modifying the model. Revit snapshot on demand 1
snapshot_export Export the Revit model to a local SQLite database for fast parallel queries. Use this before bulk context lookups or when employing sub-agents. Supports scoped exports: 'model' (full), 'level', 'levels', 'view', 'scope_box', 'category', 'selection', 'sheet'. Takes 3-60 seconds depending on scope and model size. After export, use snapshot_query for reads (<5ms each). Revit snapshot on demand 6
snapshot_export Export the Revit model to a local SQLite database for fast parallel queries. Use this before bulk context lookups or when employing sub-agents. Supports scoped exports: 'model' (full), 'level', 'levels', 'view', 'scope_box', 'category', 'selection', 'sheet'. Takes 3-60 seconds depending on scope and model size. After export, use snapshot_query for reads (<5ms each). Revit snapshot on demand 6
snapshot_query Query the model snapshot (SQLite). Returns in <5ms, no Revit thread needed. Use after snapshot_export. Accepts structured queries (table + filters) or raw SQL. Available tables: elements, parameters, rooms, levels, grids, views, sheets, families, family_types, scope_boxes, filters, worksets. Join parameters to elements on element_id for parameter lookups. Snapshot snapshot on demand 6
snapshot_query Query the model snapshot (SQLite). Returns in <5ms, no Revit thread needed. Use after snapshot_export. Accepts structured queries (table + filters) or raw SQL. Available tables: elements, parameters, rooms, levels, grids, views, sheets, families, family_types, scope_boxes, filters, worksets. Join parameters to elements on element_id for parameter lookups. Snapshot snapshot on demand 6
snapshot_review Review pending parameter changes before applying. Shows a summary of all proposed changes, grouped by agent, parameter name, or element. Use after snapshot_write, before snapshot_apply. Snapshot snapshot on demand 3
snapshot_review Review pending parameter changes before applying. Shows a summary of all proposed changes, grouped by agent, parameter name, or element. Use after snapshot_write, before snapshot_apply. Snapshot snapshot on demand 3
snapshot_write Write proposed parameter changes to the snapshot's pending_changes table. Does NOT modify the Revit model — changes are staged for review and batch application via snapshot_apply. Use snapshot_query first to identify elements and current values. Snapshot snapshot on demand 2
snapshot_write Write proposed parameter changes to the snapshot's pending_changes table. Does NOT modify the Revit model — changes are staged for review and batch application via snapshot_apply. Use snapshot_query first to identify elements and current values. Snapshot snapshot on demand 2
space_analysis_assess_around_point_in_six_directions Fire six cardinal rays (±X, ±Y, ±Z) and return distance + hit-element per direction. Use before recommending an equipment position. — context on demand 4
space_analysis_check_available_clearance_at_point Per-direction horizontal clearance (±X, ±Y) at a point, capped at a caller-supplied maximum. Returns mm + hit-element per axis. — context on demand 4
space_analysis_classify_floor_type_at_point Vertical raycast downward, find the first Floor, inspect its CompoundStructure layers + regex the names → one of {Structural | ScreededStructural | RaisedAccess | Timber | Finish | Unknown}. — context on demand 4
space_analysis_detect_ceiling_grid_in_view space_analysis_detect_ceiling_grid_in_view — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
space_analysis_detect_ceiling_height_for_room space_analysis_detect_ceiling_height_for_room — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
space_analysis_find_ceiling_void_above_point Vertical raycast from a point. Returns the first ceiling-z plus the first structural obstruction (slab/beam/roof) above it, with the void height in mm. — context on demand 4
space_analysis_find_corridor_width_from_point Fire ±X and ±Y rays to the nearest walls, return wall-to-wall widths on both axes, the narrow (corridor) width in mm, and the corridor long-axis. — context on demand 4
space_analysis_find_wall_normal_from_room_centroid space_analysis_find_wall_normal_from_room_centroid — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
space_analysis_list_boundary_walls_of_room space_analysis_list_boundary_walls_of_room — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
space_analysis_list_free_wall_space_on_wall Project every door/window/opening/hosted family onto the wall's axis and return the remaining free intervals with start, end and length (mm). — context on demand 2
space_analysis_ray_trace_2d_from_point space_analysis_ray_trace_2d_from_point — auto-generated MCP skeleton. Fill workflow body per plan §8. — context on demand 0
spawn_agent Register a sub-agent session for parallel read-only context work. — action on demand 3
spawn_agent Register a sub-agent session for parallel read-only context work. — action on demand 3
stop_cloud_agent_and_disable_debug_mode Stop the active cloud agent and disable debug mode. Reports final test results. Debug action on demand 0
stop_debug Stop the active cloud agent and disable debug mode. Reports final test results. Debug action on demand 0
supermemory_add Store information in persistent memory. Use this to save important facts, user preferences, project rules, and instructions that should be remembered across sessions. — context on demand 2
supermemory_context Get the full user profile and relevant context. Call this at the start of conversations or when you need comprehensive context about the user's preferences, projects, and instructions. — context on demand 2
supermemory_recall Search persistent memory for relevant information. Use this when the user asks about something they may have mentioned before, or when you need context from previous sessions. — context on demand 3
swap_family_instance_to_different_type Swap a family instance to another family or family type. The element must be a family instance; the target family and type must already be loaded in the document. Use list_families to discover loaded families and types. Revit action on demand 3
sync_spec_from_revit_model Sync specification project context from the active Revit model via MEPBridgeAdapter. — action on demand 1
tagging_preferences_get_smart_tag_placement_diagnostics Return per-quadrant confidence-scorer breakdown for the most recent placements made via the AnnotationPlacementEngine. Lets the AI explain why a quadrant was chosen. — context on demand 0
tagging_preferences_list_auto_tag_rules Return all currently configured auto-tag rules from %APPDATA%/MEPBridge/auto_tag_rules.json. Each rule has Id, CategoryKey, FilterParameter/FilterValue, TagFamilyName, PlacementStrategy, WithLeader, CreatedUtc. — context on demand 0
task_list Show or update a task checklist in the chat UI. Use for multi-step workflows (3+ steps). Call once with all steps pending, then call again with updated statuses as you complete each step. Send the FULL task array each time. — context on demand 1
task_list Show or update a task checklist in the chat UI. Use for multi-step workflows (3+ steps). Call once with all steps pending, then call again with updated statuses as you complete each step. Send the FULL task array each time. — context on demand 1
text_styles_get_text_note_type_definition Return the full definition of a TextNoteType: font, size, colour, bold/italic/underline, border, leader, width factor. — context on demand 0
text_styles_list_text_note_types List every TextNoteType in the document with id, name, font name, text size mm, bold/italic/underline flags, width factor, and background. — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_detect_conflicts Detect conflicts (duplicate names, type mismatches) between source and target standards. — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_diff_preview Preview the diff between source and target documents for a chosen standard before applying transfer. — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_get_transfer_log_for_standard Get the per-execution log entries for a specific standard from .mepbridge/transfer_history.json. — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_list_categories_per_standard List the categories that participate in a given transferable standard. — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_list_recent_history List recent transfer-standards executions for the current model (.mepbridge/transfer_history.json). — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_list_transferable List the transferable standards available between two open documents (Document.GetTransferableStandardsMap). — context on demand 0
transfer_standards_preview_transfer_changes Returns the precise list of items that will be added/replaced if transfer is executed. — context on demand 0
trigger_build Compile the project via the local build server (localhost:9876). Use after write_file to compile code changes. After success, call reload_dll to load the new DLL. Also runs generate_mcp_registry.py to update the tool registry. Debug action on demand 1
trigger_cloud_fix Launch a Cursor Cloud Agent to fix code. Provide the prompt with evidence and fix instructions. Returns agent ID for polling. Debug action on demand 2
ui_action_wpf Trigger a WPF UI action programmatically. window = type name substring; element = x:Name. action: click | toggle | select | set_text. value: required for select (index) and set_text. — action on demand 4
ui_action_wpf Trigger a WPF UI action programmatically. window = type name substring; element = x:Name. action: click | toggle | select | set_text. value: required for select (index) and set_text. — action on demand 4
ui_clipboard_read Read plain text from the Windows clipboard. Use after UI debug Report bug copies JSON to validate payloads. — context on demand 0
ui_clipboard_read Read plain text from the Windows clipboard. Use after UI debug Report bug copies JSON to validate payloads. — context on demand 0
ui_console_log Read the last buffered WebView2 console lines (log/warn/error) captured from the chat page. Optional filter substring and level (log|warn|error|all). Set clear_buffer true to reset. — context on demand 3
ui_console_log Read the last buffered WebView2 console lines (log/warn/error) captured from the chat page. Optional filter substring and level (log|warn|error|all). Set clear_buffer true to reset. — context on demand 3
ui_inspect_webview Execute JavaScript in a BUILD X chat WebView2 and return the result. Target: Main (default), DrawingExporter, ParameterEditor. — context on demand 2
ui_inspect_webview Execute JavaScript in a BUILD X chat WebView2 and return the result. Target: Main (default), DrawingExporter, ParameterEditor. — context on demand 2
ui_inspect_wpf Read a property from an open WPF tool window. 'window' is a substring of the window type name (e.g. DrawingExporter). Optional 'element' is x:Name. 'property' is a dot chain (e.g. IsChecked, SelectedIndex, Items.Count). Leave property empty to get the target type name. — context on demand 3
ui_inspect_wpf Read a property from an open WPF tool window. 'window' is a substring of the window type name (e.g. DrawingExporter). Optional 'element' is x:Name. 'property' is a dot chain (e.g. IsChecked, SelectedIndex, Items.Count). Leave property empty to get the target type name. — context on demand 3
ui_toggle_assert_wire Press a UI toggle (via MCPUiTogglePress) then poll the ErrorManager for an expected wire entry. Returns wire_observed=true/false plus the observed entries within the timeout. — action always 6
ui_toggle_press Press a UI button/toggle in any open BUILD X WebView2 by data-test-id or bridge action name. The press routes through the React handler → postMessage → C# bridge so the wire fires identically to a human click. — action always 3
update_file_access_permissions Manage which directories BUILD X can access. Use action='grant' to add a directory, 'revoke' to remove, 'list' to see current permissions. Grants are saved locally so the user won't be asked again across sessions. — action on demand 2
update_file_access_permissions Manage which directories BUILD X can access. Use action='grant' to add a directory, 'revoke' to remove, 'list' to see current permissions. Grants are saved locally so the user won't be asked again across sessions. — action on demand 2
update_memory Update Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (provide 'file': user_preferences/business_logic/skillset), 'domain' (provide 'domain': e.g. '63_lighting' — Claude decides the right domain from context), 'chat' (this conversation's notes). Mode 'append' adds a bullet line, 'replace' overwrites content. — context on demand 5
update_memory Update Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (provide 'file': user_preferences/business_logic/skillset), 'domain' (provide 'domain': e.g. '63_lighting' — Claude decides the right domain from context), 'chat' (this conversation's notes). Mode 'append' adds a bullet line, 'replace' overwrites content. — context on demand 5
update_parameter_editor_grid_values Update Parameter Editor rows by updates array OR filter+changes. Grid-only changes; use parameter_editor_apply to commit. Parameter editor action on demand 3
update_sheet_export_group_members Update an existing sheet group by adding or removing sheets. Drawing exporter action on demand 3
update_spec_clause Modify an existing clause in the specification library. Creates a new version. — action on demand 3
update_spec_project_context Set or update the specification project context: building type, location, disciplines, design parameters. — action on demand 7
update_user_preferences Update a user preference. Common keys: user_pref_measurement_units (metric/imperial), user_pref_default_view_scale (1:50/1:100/1:200), user_pref_mep_design_standard (CIBSE/ASHRAE), user_pref_ai_response_detail (concise/normal/detailed), user_pref_ai_thinking_steps_display (expanded/collapsed/hidden), user_pref_auto_accept_ai_changes, user_pref_favourite_commands, user_pref_display_language, user_pref_temperature_unit (celsius/fahrenheit), user_pref_pipe_sizing_standard, user_pref_duct_sizing_method. — context on demand 2
update_user_preferences Update a user preference. Common keys: user_pref_measurement_units (metric/imperial), user_pref_default_view_scale (1:50/1:100/1:200), user_pref_mep_design_standard (CIBSE/ASHRAE), user_pref_ai_response_detail (concise/normal/detailed), user_pref_ai_thinking_steps_display (expanded/collapsed/hidden), user_pref_auto_accept_ai_changes, user_pref_favourite_commands, user_pref_display_language, user_pref_temperature_unit (celsius/fahrenheit), user_pref_pipe_sizing_standard, user_pref_duct_sizing_method. — context on demand 2
upload_company_brand_profile Upload or update company brand standards: name, logo, template, fonts, colours, approved manufacturers. All subsequent specs use this branding. — action on demand 9

web_fetch Fetch a URL and return its readable text content. Strips HTML. Use after web_search to read a specific page. — context on demand 2
web_fetch Fetch a URL and return its readable text content. Strips HTML. Use after web_search to read a specific page. — context on demand 2
web_search Search the web for current information. Returns top results with titles, snippets, and URLs. Use for standards updates, product data, regulations, Revit issues, MEP pricing, manufacturer specs. — context on demand 2

workset_manager_get_worksets_with_ownership Return worksets that have a non-empty owner string. — context on demand 0
workset_manager_list_all_worksets List every workset in the document with id, name, kind, owner, IsOpen, IsVisibleByDefault. Returns empty + WireRecoverable if worksharing is disabled. — context on demand 0
workset_manager_list_elements_in_scope_box_grouped_by_workset List every element whose bounding box intersects a chosen scope box, grouped by workset. Honours linked models. — context on demand 0
workset_manager_locate_elements_on_workset_in_scope_box Locate every element on a chosen workset that lies inside a scope box. Returns ids + bounding boxes for the React UI to highlight. — context on demand 0
write_file Write content to a text file (create or overwrite). Only available when file write is enabled. Use mode 'append' to add to existing file, 'overwrite' to replace. — action on demand 3
